entity: Russell Westbrook 2016-17 season (OKC, Regular): 81 GP, 31.6 PPG, 10.7 RPG, 10.4 APG, 42 triple-doubles — the first season since Oscar Robertson (1961-62) to average a triple-double, and the first of Westbrook's four triple-double seasons

query_target.sql: SELECT season_year, season_type, CAST(gp AS INTEGER) AS gp, avg_pts, avg_reb, avg_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 201566 AND season_year = '2016-17' AND season_type = 'Regular' LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player; match:containsObject with exact values. Re-pinned 2026-07 after the curated-layer rebuild: BBR says 81 GP (2558 pts / 864 reb / 840 ast); the pre-rebuild table claimed 82 GP with diluted averages. The fixture pins per-game averages and GP only.
